city_loot.title: Loot the full Ancient City chest network — including the main chamber

subtitle.text: It did not die defending the city. It died because you left it no other option.

description: Killing the Warden drops its reinforced carapace — the only source
of the Sonic Boom effect for player use.
It is 250 HP and fires Sonic Boom regardless of armor.
If you fought it: milk removes Mining Fatigue.
The fight is manageable with maximum armor, resistance potions,
and the acceptance that you will take significant damage.
The Ancient City main chamber holds the best non-boss loot
in the deep game. Music Disc 5 plays in the city when found.
Swift Sneak books. High-tier enchanted items.
This is the payoff for surviving the descent.
The city is someone else's. The loot is yours now.
→ Loot the complete Ancient City chest network [check]
→ Collect 4 more Echo Shards from main chamber
